lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਚਾ ਊਚੋ ਊਚਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo sachaa aoocho aoochaa haumai maar milaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Dear Lord, the True One, the Highest of the High, subdues their ego and blends them with Himself. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree naam sun man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who hear and enshrine the Naam within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee kisai milaaee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, some merge with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਸੇ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur sabad mileh se vichhurreh naahee sahaje sach samaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, those who merge with the Lord shall not be separated from Him again. They merge with intuitive ease into the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚੀ ਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo saachaa saachee naaee |
lines.english: True is the Dear Lord, and True is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tujh te baahar kachhoo na hoe |
lines.english: There is nothing beyond You;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: toon kar kar vekheh jaaneh soe |
lines.english: You are the One who does, sees, and knows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae karataa guramat aap milaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: The Creator Himself acts, and inspires others to act. Through the Guru's Teachings, He blends us into Himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman gunavantee har paae |
lines.english: The virtuous soul-bride finds the Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਸਚ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa sohaagan sach upades samaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: She who serves the True Guru is forever a happy soul-bride. She is absorbed in the true teachings. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਬਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhaae seegaar banaae |
lines.english: she decorates herself with the Love and the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਨਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਠਉਰੁ ਨ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabad visaaran tinaa tthaur na tthaau |
lines.english: Those who forget the Word of the Shabad have no home and no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭੂਲੇ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੈ ਘਰਿ ਕਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhoole jiau sunyai ghar kaau |
lines.english: They are deluded by doubt, like a crow in a deserted house.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤੁ ਪਲਤੁ ਤਿਨੀ ਦੋਵੈ ਗਵਾਏ ਦੁਖੇ ਦੁਖਿ ਵਿਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: halat palat tinee dovai gavaae dukhe dukh vihaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: They forfeit both this world and the next, and they pass their lives suffering in pain and misery. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਦਿਆ ਲਿਖਦਿਆ ਕਾਗਦ ਮਸੁ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: likhadiaa likhadiaa kaagad mas khoee |
lines.english: Writing on and on endlessly, they run out of paper and ink.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae sukh paae na koee |
lines.english: Through the love with duality, no one has found peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਲਿਖਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sacho sach likheh veechaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs write and reflect on Truth, and only Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਲਿਖਹਿ ਤੈ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਕੂੜਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: koorr likheh tai koorr kamaaveh jal jaaveh koorr chit laavaniaa |6|
lines.english: They write falsehood, and they practice falsehood; they are burnt to ashes by focusing their consciousness on falsehood. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਚੇ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: se jan sache paaveh mokh duaar |
lines.english: The true ones find the gate of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਾਗਦੁ ਕਲਮ ਮਸਵਾਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਲਿਖਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sach kaagad kalam masavaanee sach likh sach samaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: True is their paper, pen and ink; writing Truth, they are absorbed in the True One. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਲੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee milai soee jan lekhai |
lines.english: Those who meet the Lord, by Guru's Grace, are acceptable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੨॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee poore gur te paavaniaa |8|22|23|
lines.english: O Nanak, glorious greatness is received through the Naam, which is obtained through the Perfect Guru. ||8||22||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬੈਠਾ ਵੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh antar baitthaa vekhai |
lines.english: My God sits deep within the self; He watches over us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aatam raam paragaas gur te hovai |
lines.english: The Divine Light of the Supreme Soul shines forth from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਲਾਗੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਖੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mail laagee gurasabadee khovai |
lines.english: The filth stuck to the ego is removed through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਾਤਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man niramal anadin bhagatee raataa bhagat kare har paavaniaa |1|
lines.english: One who is imbued with devotional worship to the Lord night and day becomes pure. Worshipping the Lord, He is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਆਪਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਨਿ ਅਵਰਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree aap bhagat karan avaraa bhagat karaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who themselves worship the Lord, and inspire others to worship Him as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਸਦ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ਕੀਜੈ ਜੋ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa bhagat janaa kau sad namasakaar keejai jo anadin har gun gaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I humbly bow to those devotees who chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, night and day. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਤੁ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jit bhaavai tith kaarai laae |
lines.english: As He pleases, He applies us to our tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag gur sevaa hovai gur sevaa te sukh paavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Through perfect destiny, we serve the Guru; serving the Guru, peace is found. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape karataa kaaran karaae |
lines.english: The Creator Lord Himself is the Doer of deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa mukat har man vasaae sahaje sehaj samaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Enshrining the Lord within their minds, they are liberated forever. With intuitive ease, they merge into the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee har man vasaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they enshrine the Lord within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਤਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mar mar jeevai taa kichh paae |
lines.english: Those who die, and remain dead while yet alive, obtain it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bahu karam kamaavai mukat na paae |
lines.english: They perform all sorts of rituals, but they do not obtain liberation through them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਸੰਤਰੁ ਭਵੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: desantar bhavai doojai bhaae khuaae |
lines.english: They wander around the countryside, and in love with duality, they are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavat raakhai tthaak rahaae |
lines.english: Those who restrain their wandering mind, keeping it steady and stable,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਕਪਟੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: birathaa janam gavaaeaa kapattee bin sabadai dukh paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The deceitful lose their lives in vain; without the Word of the Shabad, they obtain only misery. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur aape mel milaae mil preetam sukh paavaniaa |5|
lines.english: The True Guru Himself unites us in Union with the Lord. Meeting the Beloved, peace is obtained. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee param pad paae |
lines.english: obtain the supreme status, by Guru's Grace.
